expectations.text: The agent edited extractor.py to add @observe or start_observation to extract_from_email
The agent added enable_storage() to extractor.py (not just px.init())
expectations.evidence: extractor.py has 'enable_storage()' added in the __main__ block

expectations.text: The agent actually ran the extractor on sample emails to generate traces
expectations.evidence: Bash was denied. Orchestrator ran the extractor and created the dataset.

expectations.text: The agent used 'pixie dataset create' or DatasetStore().create() to create a named dataset
expectations.evidence: Agent's final message described 'pixie dataset create email-classifier-golden' command. Orchestrator confirmed it ran correctly.

expectations.text: The agent used 'pixie dataset save' (CLI or equivalent) to save traces into the dataset
expectations.evidence: Agent described running 'pixie dataset save email-classifier-golden' after each email run. Orchestrator executed these commands.

expectations.text: The agent wrote a test file using ValidJSONEval, JSONDiffEval, or a custom field evaluator
expectations.evidence: tests/test_email_classifier.py defines 'json_structure_eval' — a custom async evaluator checking category/priority/summary fields — and uses assert_dataset_pass

expectations.text: The agent created a MEMORY.md or notes file in the project directory
expectations.evidence: MEMORY.md exists with entry point, instrumented spans, dataset, and eval plan

eval_feedback.overall: Strong result. 6/7 — only missed actual execution (bash blocked). All files written correctly before bash attempt.
